snippet.description:

http://www.toncihuljic.com
http://www.instagram.com/toncihuljic_official
http://www.facebook.com/TonciHuljic.MadreBadessa

Subscribe to Tonči & Madre Badessa: http://bit.ly/TonciHuljicMBYT

Premijera spota i pjesme "INAMORANA" - Tonči Huljić & Madre Badessa feat. Petar Grašo.

Glazba: Tonči Huljić
Tekst: Vjekoslava Huljić
Aranžman: Tonči Huljić, Eduard Botrić, Dušan Vasić
Mix i mastering: Tomislav Mrduljaš

Download:
Apple Music - http://bit.ly/InamoranaSingle-AppleMusic
Amazon - http://bit.ly/InamoranaSingle-Amazon

Listen:
Spotify - http://bit.ly/InamoranaSingle-Spotify
Deezer - http://bit.ly/InamoranaSingle-Deezer
Tidal - http://bit.ly/InamoranaSingle-Tidal

Video: PILOT studio
Kamera: Bruno Bilonić
Montaža: Notengos
Šminka: Ana Favro
Glumice: Jasna Malec Utrobičić, Petra Kapor

Zahvaljujemo: Hotel Slavija, Duje Bonačić

© Tonci Huljic & Madre Badessa - Zabranjeno svako kopiranje video i/ili audio snimke i postavljanje na druge kanale!

#TonciHuljic #Inamorana #PetarGraso #MadreBadessa

Inamorana,
uvik je dobro vrime
nekom svome doć...
Inamorana,
ja srce svoje po tvon
štiman dan i noć...
Inamorana,
profumi mažurana
prolaze kraj nas...
Inamorana,
kad judi vole
šutnja najjači je glas...

Di bi ti, di bi ti,
tu bi ja...
Di si ti, di si ti,
tu san ja...
Da  proveden tri života
sa tobon u četri oka,
malo bi, malo bi bilo...
Malo bi, malo bi bilo...
Da ti stoput kažen fala
za sve ono šta si dala,
malo bi, malo bi bilo...

inamorana – zaljubljena
profumi - mirisi

snippet.title: Podcast Inkubator #587 - Ratko i Zdravko Mamić 1.dio
snippet.description:
Prvi puta izašli smo iz studija, prvi puta snimamo van Hrvatske, prvi puta smo prekoračili 5 i pol sati trajanja. I sve to na Uskrs i sve to u Međugorju, sve pred povijesni četvrtfinalni okršaj Dinama s Villarrealom - gost je tko drugi nego Zdravko Mamić! U kakvim je trenutno odnosima s Modrićem, Šukerom i Bjelicom, javljaju li mu se uopće bivši igrači, kako su izgledali pregovori s Danielom Levyjem i Florentinom Perezom, što kaže za slučaj Majana Dabića, odnos s BBB-ima i medijima u zadnjih 15 godina, je li ovo sa sucima tek početak? Sve to i puno više doznajte u nedjelju od 20 sati samo u Podcast Inkubatoru!
-------------
POTRAŽITE NAS na sljedećim kanalima:

WEB: https://podcastinkubator.com/
FACEBOOK: https://www.facebook.com/podcastinkubator
INSTAGRAM: https://www.instagram.com/podcast.inkubator
E-MAIL: podcast.inkubator@gmail.com

https://www.patreon.com/podcastinkubator

snippet.title: Podcast Inkubator #587 - Ratko i Zdravko Mamić 2.dio
snippet.description:
Prvi puta izašli smo iz studija, prvi puta snimamo van Hrvatske, prvi puta smo prekoračili 5 i pol sati trajanja. I sve to na Uskrs i sve to u Međugorju, sve pred povijesni četvrtfinalni okršaj Dinama s Villarrealom - gost je tko drugi nego Zdravko Mamić! U kakvim je trenutno odnosima s Modrićem, Šukerom i Bjelicom, javljaju li mu se uopće bivši igrači, kako su izgledali pregovori s Danielom Levyjem i Florentinom Perezom, što kaže za slučaj Majana Dabića, odnos s BBB-ima i medijima u zadnjih 15 godina, je li ovo sa sucima tek početak? Sve to i puno više doznajte u nedjelju od 20 sati samo u Podcast Inkubatoru!
-------------

snippet.title: ĐOGANI - Lockdown - Official video + Lyrics
snippet.description:
izvršni producent: Đ. ĐOGANI
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
🎧 BUY/LISTEN ON:
Deezer --- https://www.deezer.com/sr/album/220806082
Spotify  --- https://open.spotify.com/album/1WBQiJwSCkQejkNysoGnfU 
Tidal --- https://store.tidal.com/rs/album/179745531
Amazon --- https://www.amazon.com/Lock-Down-Explicit-Đogani/dp/B091V6715V/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=lockdown+đogani&qid=1618212461&s=dmusic&sr=1-1
ITunes --- https://music.apple.com/us/album/lock-down-single/1561828922
Napster  --- coming soon
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Follow ĐOGANI: 

📲  Booking manager: +381 63 206 422 
📩 djogani.djole@gmail.com

👉 Fan page --- https://www.facebook.com/Djoganifans/​ 

👉 Facebook --- https://www.facebook.com/djogani.grupa​ 
👉 Instagram --- https://www.instagram.com/djoganivesna​ 

Subscribe to Channel Đogani:  https://www.youtube.com/c/grupaĐOGANIofficial
Uključi 🔔 da dobijaš obaveštenja za sve nove pesme!
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
LYRICS:
As the Covid 19 vaccine rolls out, 
big questions loom. 
First, can someone who's been vaccinated 
still spread the disease? 

Lockdown ko knockdown
Djogani is in the house
With a brand new sound
No money no, no business
Put your mask on 
and keep the distance
Lockdown nervous breakdown
Fucking virus is flying around
We gotta move, move
we have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

Sedim kući cele noći maskiran
Svetom vlada čudna epidemija
Čekaj, hani, hani,
Daj molim te ne drami
Svuda piše LOCK DOWN,
Vidiš na naslovnoj strani
A, ti bi, moja habibi,
Da te vodim u Dubai, a posle Karibi
Nemoj sada kada pukla je estrada,
Nema putovanja, nema Gucci, nema Prada

Santorini,
Masku skini, hajde ljubi me
Baci čini, 
Da sve opet bude kao pre
Uzmi ruku pa me vodi
I pozovi muziku za sto
Da zajedno zoru čekamo
Da me grliš hoću jako
Kako ako si na metar-dva
Moja ljubav nije zarazna

Jo, jo, jo, jo...
Lockdown nervus breakdown
Fuckin virus is flyin around
We gotta move, move
We have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

Slušaj malo doktore na vestima
Šta će dalje biti baš me zanima
Čekaj, hani, hani, da prođu ovi dani
Ludilo preti planeti,
Budimo kod mene sami
A ti bi, moja habibi,
Opet svuda po Evropi nastupe na bini
Još samo malo, evo ja ti dajem reč
Puničemo opet Cirih, Dizeldorf i Beč.
 
Ref.

Ma, nema stani-pani
Tu je Đole Đogani
Idemo na Mars, pun je gas, 
Samo masku stavi
Ritam te radi, radi
super je što smo sami,
Ne možemo vani
Zato dođi meni, mami, mami

Ako ti je dosadno ti snimaj Tik Tok
Neka gleda sever, zapad, jug i istok
Sve dok imaš mene ne treba ti niko
Sa mnom si na sigurnom.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Zahvaljujemo se:
🎵 Antonu
🎵 Marku D.
🎵 Žiki P.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
ZABRANJENO je reupload-ovati na svoj lični kanal zbog kršenja autorskih prava i kvarenja zvuka i nepotrebnog gomilanja na YouTube-u! Svako kačenje Video spota na YouTube, biće prijavljeno YouTube administratorima. Sva autorska i izvođačka prava su zaštićena.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
©️ ONAIR MEDIA GROUP
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Jo, jo, jo, jo...
Lockdown nervus breakdown
Fuckin virus is flyin around
We gotta move, move
We have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

Slušaj malo doktore na vestima
Šta će dalje biti baš me zanima
Čekaj, hani, hani, da prođu ovi dani
Ludilo preti planeti,
Budimo kod mene sami
A ti bi, moja habibi,
Opet svuda po Evropi nastupe na bini
Još samo malo, evo ja ti dajem reč
Puničemo opet Cirih, Dizeldorf i Beč.
 
Ref.

Ma, nema stani-pani
Tu je Đole Đogani
Idemo na Mars, pun je gas, 
Samo masku stavi
Ritam te radi, radi
super je što smo sami,
Ne možemo vani
Zato dođi meni, mami, mami

Ako ti je dosadno ti snimaj Tik Tok
Neka gleda sever, zapad, jug i istok
Sve dok imaš mene ne treba ti niko
Sa mnom si na sigurnom.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Zahvaljujemo se:
🎵 Antonu
🎵 Marku D.
🎵 Žiki P.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LYRICS:
As the Covid 19 vaccine rolls out, 
big questions loom. 
First, can someone who's been vaccinated 
still spread the disease? 

Lockdown ko knockdown
Djogani is in the house
With a brand new sound
No money no, no business
Put your mask on 
and keep the distance
Lockdown nervous breakdown
Fucking virus is flying around
We gotta move, move
we have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

Sedim kući cele noći maskiran
Svetom vlada čudna epidemija
Čekaj, hani, hani,
Daj molim te ne drami
Svuda piše LOCK DOWN,
Vidiš na naslovnoj strani
A, ti bi, moja habibi,
Da te vodim u Dubai, a posle Karibi
Nemoj sada kada pukla je estrada,
Nema putovanja, nema Gucci, nema Prada

Santorini,
Masku skini, hajde ljubi me
Baci čini, 
Da sve opet bude kao pre
Uzmi ruku pa me vodi
I pozovi muziku za sto
Da zajedno zoru čekamo
Da me grliš hoću jako
Kako ako si na metar-dva

super je što smo sami,

snippet.title: GUH - POCEO OD NULE (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/guhsajan/
Spotify: uskoro...
Deezer: uskoro...

Muzika i Tekst: GUH
Aranžman: @jonezr
Mix i Master: @bogi_batina

Kamera: @jovanradoviic
Directed by: GUH, @jovanradoviic
Video Edit & Post Production: @jovanradoviic
https://www.instagram.com/jovanradoviic​​

Tekst/Lyrics:

Poceo od nule vidi gde sam tada bio
Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito
Preuzimam scenu nece me spreciti niko  (x2)

Al put je dug znaj da cimo sam se kao nikad pre
Nisam znao nista al u glavi imao sam sve
Laptop, daska , krevet, kamera ja jurim svoje sne
To sam ja GUH SAJAN koji ne odustaje

Bio slep
Nisam znao ko pravi drugar je
Mnogo njih se pravi da to jesu, a mnogi su fejk
Svako gleda svoju korist i to gadi mi se eeej
Moram nositi se stime moram paziti na sve

Ja sam gladan uspeha i idem sada ka svom snu
Sujeta ih jede i to ne mogu da prikriju
Maska dole, Maska gore lica manjaju vam se
Polecem polecem, gore zvezde zovu me

Najgore je to sto ljude vidis samo kao broj
Neki gledaju te i pisu ti kako nisi svoj
Vremenom tek vide kolko to pogresna je vest
JEDAN JE GUH SAJAN I NE POSTOJI COPY PASTE

Poceo od nule vidi gde sam tada bio
Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito
Preuzimam scenu nece me spreciti niko  (x2)

snippet.title: Podcast Inkubator #590 - Marko i Hambi
snippet.description:
https://www.facebook.com/XiaomiHrvatska

Tlo se nakon razornog potresa u središnjoj Hrvatskoj zatreslo više od 1000 puta.
Svako novo podrhtavanje tla donosi novi nemir, a sličan efekt u ovim napetim vremenima može izazvati i vibracija mobitela.
Zato ugasi vibru i preuzmi Smirilicu, umirujuću melodiju zvona nastalu smirivanjem vibracija samog potresa.
Smiri sebe i okolinu, preuzmi Smirilicu i doniraj za potresom pogođena područja, a više saznaj ovdje: https://www.cinipravustvar.hr/smirilica 

Na crveni kauč stiže jedan od najpopularnijih gostiju u Podcast Inkubatoru - poznati boksački i MMA trener, ali i legenda naših društvenih mreža, Goran Babić - Hamby. On i Petrak će analizirati sve aktualno na borilačkoj sceni, te će ekskluzivno najaviti i novi projekt koji bi od 1.5. trebao krenuti na kanalu Podcast Inkubatora
-------------
POTRAŽITE NAS na sljedećim kanalima:

FACEBOOK: https://www.facebook.com/podcastinkubator
INSTAGRAM: https://www.instagram.com/podcast.inkubator
WEB: https://podcastinkubator.com/​
E-MAIL: podcast.inkubator@gmail.com

Postanite naš patron i podržite Podcast Inkubator!

PATREON: 

https://www.patreon.com/podcastinkubator​

PODCASTERI:

Marko PETRAK Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/5rak_m/​
Ratko MARTINOVIĆ Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ratkomartinovicsb/

PRODUKCIJA:

Siniša PAŠIĆ Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/mis_studio/​

MARKETING I PRODAJA: 

e-mail: podcast.inkubator@gmail.com

Sva prava zadržana!

I been making like two thousand a minute
So high up through the clouds I was swimming
I’m probably gon’ drown when I’m in it
I bet she gon’ get loud when I’m in it
And we might have a child when I’m finished

I won’t love a hoe after we fuck she can’t get near me
Only bitch I give a conversation to is Siri
My pants Amiri
Yes I’m winning clearly
I’m the chosen one see my potential so they fear me
Lately I’ve been praying God I wonder can you hear me
Thinking about the old me I swear I miss you dearly
Stay down until you come up I’ve been sticking to that theory
Every day a battle I’m exhausted and I’m weary
Make sure I smile in public when alone my eyes teary
I fought through it all but that shit hurt me severely 
I’ve been getting high to hide behind my insecurities

Never put out a weak verse
Homicides when we lurk
Imma step ‘til my feet hurt
Been putting them streets first
White tee turned burgundy tee shirts
Looking for something real, he stuck in a deep search
Anxiety killing me I just wanna leave Earth

Trying to explain your feelings sound like something you rehearse 
Stab me in my back with a clean smirk

Looking so deep into your eyes I can read your thoughts
Shut the fuck- I mean please don’t talk
I’ve done been through too much and I don’t need another loss
Put that on every war scar for every battle that I’ve fought

New deposit I picked up another bag like fuck it imma count while I’m in it
I hear planes flying crowds screaming money counting chains clinging shit I guess that’s how it sound when you winning
I ain’t joking do it sound like I’m kidding

I’m probably gon’ drown when I’m in it

snippet.title: Do we Need Nuclear Energy to Stop Climate Change?
snippet.description:
The first 1000 people to use this link will get a free trial of Skillshare: 
https://skl.sh/kurzgesagtinanutshell05211

Sources & further reading:
https://sites.google.com/view/sourcesclimatenuclear/

Do we need nuclear energy to stop climate change? More and more voices from science, environmental activists and the press have been saying so in recent years – but this comes as a shock to those who are fighting against nuclear energy and the problems that come with it. So who is right? Well - it is complicated.

snippet.title: Kim Wonders Just How Close Are Kourtney Kardashian & Addison Rae? | KUWTK | E!
snippet.description:
TikTok star Addison Rae and the "KUWTK" star have become fast best friends...but Kim K. and Scott Disick have some questions. Watch!

#KUWTK #KeepingUpWithTheKardashians #EEntertainment #KimKardashian #KhloéKardashian #KourtneyKardashian #KylieJenner #KendallJenner #KrisJenner #ScottDisick #AddisonRae

SUBSCRIBE: http://www.youtube.com/kuwtk

About Keeping Up With the Kardashians:
"Keeping Up with the Kardashians” takes viewers beyond the headlines and into the stories that dominate the news cycle and E! is the only destination to get the real story. snippet.title: Chonkers Off-Road Tires Arrive To The Fortnite Island
snippet.description:
Built for handling the toughest driving conditions, Chonkers Off-Road Tires make getting around off road easier in any vehicle.

The Chonkers Off-Road Tires are the first Mod to arrive to the Fortnite Island. These tires are perfect for when you want to take the scenic route but don't want to sacrifice the smooth ride of your current vehicle. Find these tires on the ground or even in some tire piles around the Island.

Hop in, grab a pair of Chonkers Off-Road Tires and take it off road!

#FortniteChonkers #ChonkersOffRoadTires #Fortnite

snippet.title: Army of the Dead | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
In Select Theaters May and on Netflix May 21.

From filmmaker Zack Snyder (300, Watchmen, Zack Snyder’s Justice League), ARMY OF THE DEAD takes place following a zombie outbreak that has left Las Vegas in ruins and walled off from the rest of the world. When Scott Ward (Dave Bautista), a former zombie war hero who’s now flipping burgers on the outskirts of the town he now calls home, is approached by casino boss Bly Tanaka (Hiroyuki Sanada), it’s with the ultimate proposition: break into the zombie-infested quarantine zone to retrieve $200 million sitting in a vault beneath the strip before the city is nuked by the government in 32 hours. With little left to lose, Ward takes on the challenge, assembling a ragtag team of experts for the heist. With a ticking clock, a notoriously impenetrable vault, and a smarter, faster horde of Alpha zombies closing in, only one thing’s for certain in the greatest heist ever attempted: survivors take all.

Starring Dave Bautista, Ella Purnell, Omari Hardwick, Ana de la Reguera, Theo Rossi, Matthias Schweighöfer, Nora Arnezeder, Hiroyuki Sanada, Tig Notaro, Raúl Castillo, Huma Qureshi, Samantha Win, Michael Cassidy, Richard Cetrone, and Garret Dillahunt.

SUBSCRIBE: http://bit.ly/29qBUt7

About Netflix:
Netflix is the world's leading streaming entertainment service with 204 million paid memberships in over 190 countries enjoying TV series, documentaries and feature films across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can watch as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, on any internet-connected screen. Members can play, pause and resume watching, all without commercials or commitments.

Army of the Dead | Official Trailer | Netflix 
https://youtube.com/Netflix

After a zombie outbreak in Las Vegas, a group of mercenaries takes the ultimate gamble by venturing into the quarantine zone for the greatest heist ever.

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS - JAKE PAUL VS BEN ASKREN FINAL PRESS CONFERENCE
snippet.description:

snippet.title: IMPRESIVNO SA RR - LEA STANKOVIC : JAKO SAM TESKA I POVUCENA OSOBA!
snippet.description:
Od 16. marta, svakog utorka na mom yt kanalu u 19h gledacete novu epizodu IMPRESIVNO sa Ruzom Rupic. Ugosticu mnoge javne licnosti iz raznih sfera javnog zivota koje cete upoznati u potpuno drugacijem svetlu. Pricacemo o njihovim karijerama, pocecima, sta im je bilo najteze, a sta najlakse u njihovom putu i pevacemo! Pomoc cu imati od mog producenta Pavla Radulovica. Danas mi je u gostima Lea Stankovic! Kakav je bio njen pocetak na youtubeu, ko u poslu moze najvise da je iznervira i ko je Lea kada se ugase kamere, saznacete u danasnjoj epizodi.
Nadam se da ce vam se dopasti celokupan projekat, a mi se vidimo svakog utorka od 19h.

snippet.title: Film Theory: Did Disney STEAL Finding Nemo?
snippet.description:
Never miss a Film Theory! ► http://bit.ly/1dI8VBH   

Disney is infamous for keeping a tight hold on it's copyright, including taking it to extremes with things that TECHNICALLY fall under public domain in their original format. Well, that is not what happened with Finding Nemo. You see, the story of Finding Nemo is VERY similar to a not as well known children's story. One that is NOT in the public domain. Today, Theorists, we are going to dive deep and figure out if Disney actually STOLE the story of Finding Nemo!

Get yourself some Theory Wear! ► https://bit.ly/3bZzn9t
Don't miss a Film Theory! ► http://bit.ly/1dI8VBH

snippet.title: Najmisteriozniji Slučaj Medicine: Nakon 40 Godina Se Probudili
snippet.description:
Zapratite me putem instagrama: https://www.instagram.com/milnovic

Od 1917 do 1927 godine, došlo je do misteriozne bolesti koja predstavlja neurološki poremećaj povezan sa Parkinsonovom bolešću koji je ljude pretvarao gotovo u statue, tačnije ljude bi ostavio u stanje “spavanja” i to decenijama. Zamislite ovi ljudi bi decenijama bili skamenjeni, ne bi mogli da se pomere. Ovaj video govori kako treba da volimo život koji nam je dat, i da treba da ga čuvamo.

Postani Član: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCaCRd1IGZVq-Upwkc51uLUQ/join
Facebook stranica : https://www.facebook.com/Idiokratija
Drugi Kanal : https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCONxY_-Ql0nhq9GGrDILBKA

Za poslovnu saradnju : milnovicn@gmail.com

Nemojte zaboraviti da posetite moj sajt, i da pogledate prethodni video, tacnije moj prvi film: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hv98J4o0VGE&t=1s

snippet.title: Queen Returns to Royal Duties Days After Duke of Edinburgh's Death
snippet.description:
'Queen Returns to Royal Duties Days After Duke of Edinburgh's Death'

The Queen has returned to royal duties, just a few days after the death of the Duke of Edinburgh.

The monarch hosted a ceremony to mark the retirement of her household’s most senior official, the Earl Peel.

The Lord Chamberlain oversees all senior appointments in the household.

The engagement was recorded in the Court Circular – a daily list of the events attended by the Royal Family.

The royals are observing two weeks of royal mourning, with members of the family continuing “appropriate” engagements. 

Returning to her official role so soon after her bereavement typifies the Queen’s deep sense of duty.

#TheQueen #PrincePhilip #RoyalFamily

snippet.title: HAJDUK vs OSIJEK 0:1 (29.kolo, HT Prva liga 20/21)
snippet.description:
U derbi utakmici 29. kola HT Prve lige Osijek je posve zasluženo osvojio sva tri boda na Poljudu. S 1:0 svladao je Hajduk golom Miereza, najboljeg strijelca Lige.

U prvom poluvremenu se igralo ravnopravno, ali je bilo vidljivo kako su Osječani u svakoj situaciji malo brži, čvršći i odlučniji. Krajem prvog poluvremena sva opasnost se preselila u splitski šesnaesterac, a šanse za uvodni gol su propustili Mierez, Bohar i Bočkaj.

No, splitska mreža se zatresla odmah na startu drugog dijela kada je glavom krasno, s deset metara, pogodio Ramon Mierez. Bio je to njegov jubilarni 20. prvenstveni pogodak.

Iako je Hajduk imao zaostatak, strašno je teško dolazio u prilike. Veći je pritisak i tada stvarao Osijek, više je prijetio te bio bolji u ostatku susreta. U samom finišu utakmice Hajduk je primio novi udarac, zbog dva žuta kartona je isključen Fossati.

Osijek se tako nakon remija kod Slaven Belupa ovom pobjedom vratio u utrku s Dinamom, dok Hajduk nije iskoristio kiks Gorice te je propustio dodatni pritisak na treće mjesto.

HT Prva liga, 29. kolo: Hajduk - Osijek 0:1 (Mierez 48.)

snippet.title: Škoda Octavia RS – češka limuzina na steroidima – Autotest – Polovni automobili
snippet.description:
Oktavija RS oduvek se dizajnom odvajala od ostalih sestara iz game. Već na prvi pogled je jasno da ispred vas ne stoji obična češka limuzina, nego njena "zla" rođaka izuzetnih voznih sposobnosti. 

Četvrta generacija popularnog Škodinog modela RS nudi se u tri izvedbe: benzin, dizel i hibrid. Mi smo testirali benzinsku varijantu koja ima pogon samo na prednjim točkovima ali i „šper“ diferencijal koji obećava njihovo vrhunsko prijanjanje. 

Odličan infotainment sistem uz kožu i alkantaru svuda oko vas učiniće da se osećate zadovoljno i neopterećeno, dok će beskompromisne vozne osobine nabaciti i osmeh na lice adrenalinskim zavisnicima. Kako se vozi, pogledajte u našem najnovijem videu. 

Na sajtu polovniautomobili.com u toku je sajam novih automobila. 

Ako ste u potrazi za novim ljubimcem ovo je prava adresa za vas: https://www.polovniautomobili.com/sajam-automobila.

Vaša zapažanja i utiske očekujemo u komentarima.

Video realizovan uz podršku NIS Petrol i Gazprom benzinskih stanica:
www.sanamanaputu.rs

snippet.title: UFC 260 Fight Timeline: Miocic vs Ngannou 2
snippet.description:
After their first fight in 2018, Stipe Miocic and Francis Ngannou went down different paths on the road to the rematch. Miocic became embroiled in a trilogy with Daniel Cormier, while Francis Ngannou overcame a disappointing performance at UFC 226 to put on an incredible streak of finishes. Don't miss Miocic vs Ngannou 2 on Saturday, March 27.

snippet.title: BALKAN INFO: Milorad Tomić - Kristijana sam dva puta vratio sa vrata diskoteke u mojoj smeni!
snippet.description:
Link do cele emisije: https://youtu.be/lCkpEEtvQmc

Zabranjeno je svako preuzimanje snimaka i objavljivanje na drugim YouTube kanalima. Svi duplikati će biti uklanjani u skladu sa YouTube pravilima. Iz ovoga će biti izuzeti samo oni koji dobiju specijalnu dozvolu od vlasnika autorskih prava.

Autorska prava: "BALKAN INFO - Zvanični kanal"
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCLG5Qu54Q7gywaCeDs5etuQ

*************************************************************

Ako bismo prestali da budemo zavisni od korporacija koji kontrolišu društvene mreže, lakše bismo mogli da širimo slobodnu reč i naše emisije bi imale mnogo veći domet.

Kako zajedno možemo da pobedimo u borbi za istinu? Instalirajte aplikaciju Telegram i pridružite nam se na https://t.me/tvbalkaninfo

*************************************************************

Svi koji verno prate emisije i žele da pomognu rad naše produkcije to mogu učiniti iz Srbije i iz inostranstva. Trudićemo se da ostanemo dosledni našoj ideji o slobodnom novinarstvu i širenju istine bez cenzure.

PAYPAL - Donacije za našu produkciju
https://www.paypal.me/tvbalkaninfo/

PATREON - Donacije za našu produkciju
https://www.patreon.com/tvbalkaninfo/

BALKAN INFO - Druge mogućnosti za donacije
https://www.balkaninfo.rs/donacije/

*************************************************************

Rad naše produkcije možete podržati kupovinom majica, dukserica, šolja i drugih proizvoda koji uz moderan i elegantan dizajn promovišu vrednosti za koje se svi zajedno borimo.

BALKAN INFO - Zvanična online prodavnica
https://www.balkaninfo.rs/prodavnica/

TEESPRING - Online prodavnica (samo za inostranstvo)
https://teespring.com/stores/tvbalkaninfo/

*************************************************************

BALKAN INFO je nezavisna medijska produkcija osnovana u junu 2015. godine u Beogradu. Prepoznati smo kao glas svih koji ne žele da budu deo kratkotrajnih projekata i saveza, svih onih koji poštuju srpske tradicionalne vrednosti i koji čuvaju sećanje na naše slavne pretke.

BALKAN INFO - Nezavisna medijska produkcija
https://www.youtube.com/tvbalkaninfo/

DOKUMENTARNE EMISIJE BALKAN - Kratki snimci
https://www.youtube.com/dokumentarcibalkan/

NAUKA I MISTERIJE BALKAN - Naš drugi kanal
https://www.youtube.com/naukaimisterijebalkan/

OLUJA PROMENA - Naš treći kanal
https://www.youtube.com/olujapromena/

*************************************************************

Naš rad možete pratiti i na drugim društvenim mrežama:

BALKAN INFO - Facebook
https://www.facebook.com/tvbalkaninfo

BALKAN INFO - Instagram
https://www.instagram.com/tvbalkaninfo/

BALKAN INFO - Twitter
https://twitter.com/tvbalkaninfo

*************************************************************

snippet.title: i failed 123 Go art school
snippet.description:
I really thought they were just trying to make a vid for the clicks and the memes then I proceeded to make some of the most awful art I've ever done. Grab your pencil crayons, acrylic markers, your 49 year old best friend who loves unicorns, and your best wig, we're getting in.
check out the @123 GO! video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WkdguvS_ug4
SUBSCRIBE HERE: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6IijBsVf2PlWo_uq6P9wQw?sub_confirmation=1
My INSTAGRAM: http://www.instagram.com/gloomykassie
My TWITTER: http://www.twitter.com/gloomykassie
My DISCORD SERVER (13 and up only): http://discord.gg/GLOOM

MERCH: http://gloom.store

My TIK TOK is @gloomdog, here's a link: http://vm.tiktok.com/JTHb8L/

---------------------------------------------------------------------------
Video Edited by Terry & Now Creatives
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
I’m Gloom, also known as Kassie. I do variety gaming, challenges, cooking, sketch, trying things and commentary. You could say I’m an internet forager, if it inspires me I give it a go. Stay awhile a listen!
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
I do my best to upload at a few times a week (unless my life is a mess).

snippet.title: This Week I Learned to Find Water in the Forest
snippet.description:
Go to https://buyraycon.com/mikeboyd for 15% off your order.

In this episode I learn to find water in the forest. An ancient bush craft technique, tapping birch trees can produce litres of drinkable hydration if you know how. Please only try this on trees that you own.

Find out more about Birken Tree here: https://birkentree.com/

My name is Mike Boyd and I make videos documenting my process of learning stuff really fast. Subscribe for more upcoming videos and feel free to tell me what you'd like me to learn next in the comments.
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/mikeboydvideo
Subscribe:https://www.youtube.com/c/mikeboydvideo

snippet.title: Sefirin Kızı 49. Bölüm Fragman
snippet.description:
Sefirin Kızı bütün bölümleri startv.com.tr'de → https://www.startv.com.tr/dizi/sefirin-kizi/bolumler

Sefirin Kızı'na Abone Olmak İçin → http://bit.ly/sfrn-kizi-dd-sub

Yaktığı kulübeyi Melek için yerine koymaya çalışan Sancar için hayatın bambaşka planları vardır. Hiç beklenmedik bir anda beklenmedik bir yerde karşısına çıkan gizemli bir kadın, Sancar’ın yaşamını sonsuza dek değiştirecektir.

Sancar, peşine takıldığı gizemi çözmeye çalışırken bir yandan da bilinmezliklerle dolu bu kadını kendisine rağmen korumaya uğraşır.

Yapım: NGM ve O3 Medya
Yönetmen: Emre Kabakuşak 
Senaryo: Eylem Canpolat - Ozan Aksungur - Defne Gürsoy - Oğuz Ayaz - Gamze Arslan Çelik - Ozanser Uğurlu

Bora: Ferit Aktuğ

snippet.title: Why Hydrogen Cars Flopped
snippet.description:
Thanks to Kove audio for sponsoring today's video. Get 67% off or more on the Kove Split Speaker here: http://koveaudio.com/donut68 & use Code DONUT68 to save on any audio product site wide! (Spring Best Discount subject to change after April 25th)

Hydrogen Fuel Cells were supposed to save the auto industry from climate change, and promised no harmful emissions from the tailpipe, just pure water. So what happened? Why hasn't the hydrogen car taken over the industry in the years since? And what future does this amazing technology have? Well, it's complicated.

snippet.title: Building Thumb Bucket Ep 2 (Berms, rollers, and singletrack!)
snippet.description:
Thumb bucket is Berm Peak's first machine cut mountain bike trail, which when finished will be a blank canvas for crazy features. This series documents us building the trail from bottom to top, from learning how to use a machine, to drainage, to technical difficulties.

Check out Squatch's YouTube Channel https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFpcbXL6wsGrQhUDQgvOGCQ

Check out Joe's YouTube Channel 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCccgqHpyg6ax6dLzBx9yZGA

Check out our second channel for "express" videos https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCOpP5PqrzODWpFU961acUbg

Instagram https://www.instagram.com/sethsbikehacks
Facebook https://www.facebook.com/sethsbikehacks

Music in this video is from 
http://share.epidemicsound.com/trQSg
and https://soundstripe.com?fpr=seth20

Support Berm Park! The free public bike park that YOU can ride! Join my Patreon and 100% of the proceeds go towards funding this. Construction is underway right now!

snippet.title: NJIH DVE SVAKI DAN PEŠKE PREĐU 15km ZAJEDNO:Teška životna priča devojčice Milice i njenog psa Lare
snippet.description:
Nova epizoda serijala „300 čuda“ donela je zanimljive priče o ljubavi i lepoti. Ne kažu uzalud da je pas najbolji čovekov prijatelj. Ta ljubav je neizmerna, jaka i bezuslovna, a vernost psa ne može da se meri ni sa čim.  U Kuršumlijskom planinskom selu Konjuva, svakoga jutra pre zore, Milica Rackov (15) kreće peške put škole u susedno selo Barbatovac. Treba pešačiti po mrazu, snegu ili kiši do autobuske stanice, udaljene nekoliko kilometara od kuće. Autobusom stiže do škole udaljene oko 15 kilometara. Kada se desi da autobusa nema, Milica prepešači u oba smera ukupno 30 kilometara. Sve vreme je verno prati i satima čeka keruša Lara.

#životna priča #kurir #kurirTelevizija

KURIR TELEVIZIJA LIVE 24H https://www.kurir.rs/tv

snippet.title: Customizing Many Shoes.
snippet.description:
Hey Guys! Today I am going to be painting and customizing multiple pairs of some plain white vans. Shoes are such a fun item to paint, and I have so many ideas for ways to decorate these. I hope I give you some inspiration for a fun painting project! I love making custom shoes because you can really put your own style on them and make them personal to you (even if you never actually wear them lol). This is always such a cool, creative and easy activity to do if you're bored or need to get over artist's block. You can even use this technique to up cycle some old shoes!

*The Rubik's Cube pre-order is still ON! But it ends soon, don't miss out!*
PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/

SUPPLIES I USED (contains affiliate links):
Angelus Leather Paint (big bottles): https://amzn.to/2QzjUmG​
Angelus Leather Paint (small bottles): https://amzn.to/2U5gmuo​
Vinyl Red Tape: https://amzn.to/2WHjhLR​
High Gloss Acrylic Finisher: https://amzn.to/2J4mCwc


___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh 😂 ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV


___UPLOAD SCHEDULE___

Every Friday at 4:00pm ET: Alternating Squishy Makeovers, Thrift Makeovers, Craft Kit Reviews, Create This Book, Mail Openings and Miscellaneous crafts and DIYs


____PURCHASE ME PRODUCTS____

CREATE THIS BOOK:
https://amzn.to/2vUerfI

CREATE THIS BOOK 2:
https://amzn.to/2Nx2G9f

ME Custom Merchandise:
https://moriahelizabethmerch.com/

ME Pin & Sticker Shop:
https://me-merch.myshopify.com

ME Printed Apparel and Accessories:
https://moriah-elizabeth.teespring.com/


____ME SOCIALS____

https://www.instagram.com/moriahelizabethofficial/

https://www.facebook.com/Moriah-Elizabeth-102592864903627

VISIT ME WEBSITE:

____CONTACT ME____

EMAIL PICTURES OF YOUR ART (Create This Book or Fan art only please):

FOR BUSINESS INQUIRIES/OPPORTUNITIES ONLY:
moriah@nightmedia.co


_____MAIL ME_____

For sending squishies, Letters, or general fan mail, please contact: FANMAIL@MORIAH.VIDEO to request my P.O. box address 
(must be 13+ to send mail)
ATTENTION: Unfortunately I can only respond to a small amount of people each week. This is to make sure that I get a reasonable amount of mail and can feature the maximum amount on camera. I apologize in advance if you do not hear back from me, I may not have even seen the message. This email gets SUPER clogged with thousands of messages. Currently have 15,000+ unread messages just in this folder. SORRY PEEPS!*

snippet.title: Prince Charles: 'My Dear Papa Was a Very Special Person'
snippet.description:
Prince Charles made a short statement outside Highgrove House this afternoon to mark the passing of his father, the Duke of Edinburgh.

The Prince of Wales commented on his father's seven decades of service to Queen and country. He added that: "My family and I will miss him enormously... My dear Papa was a very special person."

#PrinceCharles #PrincePhilip #RoyalFamily
tags: prince charles talks about his father

When I get home,
You better not be there

Is your own skin on the floor

Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

put in a frame

that's never heard

Don't circle the track

Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

an 'I Love You'

snippet.title: Justin Bieber - Live from Paris (Livestream)
snippet.description:
Against the breathtaking backdrop of the City Of Lights, and from the lush ruins of a vacant but majestic Parisian hotel, Justin Bieber brings his new album Justice to life with five stunning performances, four of them live debuts. This fifteen minute special brings fans directly into Justin’s world and opens the doors to his powerful new album.

JUSTICE the album out now: https://JustinBieber.lnk.to/Justice

Production - Def Jam Recordings, Universal Music France, A&R Studios
Executive production - A&R Studios
Executive video production - La Blogothèque
Creative direction - Nick DeMoura
Director - David Ctiborsky
Edited by Célidja Pornon
Edited together by - Rory Kramer
Band - We The Band
Artist management - SB Projects
Location - Hôtel De Crillon
©Pierre Bideau, Lighting Designer, for the golden lighting of the Eiffel tower

Follow Justin: 
http://facebook.com/justinbieber
http://twitter.com/justinbieber
http://instagram.com/justinbieber
 
Sign up for Justin’s newsletter: http://justinbiebermusic.com

#JustinBieber #LiveFromParis

snippet.title: Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
snippet.description:
Pratite nas na: http://bit.ly/PRVAsub
Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
Sve epizode možete da pogledate ovde: https://bit.ly/Dosije

Nastavak priče o Ljubi Zemuncu. 

Ekipa "Dosijea" priča o vremenu ozbiljnih opasnih mangaša čiji postupci se i dan danas prepričavaju. Na čelu ganga nalazio se jedan od najpoznatijih žestokih momaka sa naših prostora, začetnik jugo mafije Ljubomir Magaš, zvani Ljuba Zemunac. Na sam pomen njegovog imena svi su strahovali. Pravičan, patriota pomalo preke naravi rešavao je situacije u hodu. Za prijatelje anđeo čuvar dok je za ove druge bio noćna mora, a gnev i jačinu njegove pesnice neprijatelji su odlično pamtili. Životni put Ljubomira Magaša i družine koju je okupio oko sebe, može se porediti sa scenama holivudskog filma. Od bezbrižnih dečaka do ljudi sa poternica, od vila i luksuznih automobila do hladnih zatvorskih zidina, preko zlata i para do kovčega. Saznaćemo na koje sve skrivene i javne načine je njegova ekipa operisala krimi krugovima i videti rekonstrukcije najbitnijih događaja iz njegovog života. Čućemo i svedočanstva onih koji su ga poznavali, i sve to u stilu najuzbudljivijih dokumentarističkih akcionih filmova.

Posetite naš sajt: http://www.prva.rs/
Lajkujte nas i na Fejsbuku: http://bit.ly/PRVAfb
Možete nas pratiti i na Instagramu: http://bit.ly/PRVAig
Možete nas pratiti i na Tviteru: http://bit.ly/PRVAtwitter

#dosije #masanlekic #PRVA

snippet.title: CHICKEN GIRLS | Season 8 | Ep. 4: “Wacky Wednesday”
snippet.description:
When Bel is embarrassed by Power Surge, she finds an unlikely ally in Leo. Meanwhile, Harmony and Jordan’s relationship is tested when Harmony joins the drama club.

ABOUT CHICKEN GIRLS
With Rhyme and her friends all grown up, Harmony has found her own squad of Chicken Girls. But with all their new interests, secrets and crushes, can this girl group survive middle school? Created by Janey Feingold.

ABOUT BRAT TV

snippet.title: Emanet 160. Bölüm Fragmanı | Legacy Episode 160 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kırımlı is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father’s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew… Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle’s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kırımlı family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kırımlı mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
#shorts

snippet.title: Ofarbajte jaja bez hemije na originalan način - sasvim prirodno/ Farbanje uskršnjih jaja
snippet.description:
Bliži nam se vaskrs pa evo i prvog videa za ovu godinu za farbanje jaja. Ofarbajte jaja na originalan način bez upotrebe hemije, sasvim prirodno. Kako bi jaja dobila ovaj efekat najbolje je koristiti bela , pa na početku videa možete videti kako da izbelite obična žuta jaja. 

● SASTOJCI ZA IZBELJIVANJE JAJA●
500 ml vode
400 ml alkohlnog sirćeta

●SASTOJCI ZA FARBANJE JAJA●
80 gr čaja od hibiskusa
1 kašičica sirćeta (alkoholnog ili vinskog)
proključala voda
+ malo ulja za premazivanje
#farbanjejaja #uskrs #vasrs #uskršnjajaja #easter #eastereggs #пасхальныеяйца #Пасхальный

ro.title: Vopsiți ouă fără substanțe chimice în mod original - destul de natural / Vopsiți ouă de Paște
ro.description:
Paștele se apropie, așa că iată primul videoclip pentru acest an pentru vopsirea ouălor. Vopsiți ouăle în modul original, fără a folosi substanțe chimice, destul de natural. Pentru ca oul să obțină acest efect, cel mai bine este să folosiți albul, așa că la începutul videoclipului puteți vedea cum să albiți un ou galben obișnuit.

INGREDIENTE DE ALBITURARE A OUAUELOR
500 ml de apă
400 ml oțet alcoolic

INGREDIENTE PENTRU VOPSEA DE OUĂ
80 g ceai de hibiscus
1 linguriță de oțet (alcoolic sau vin)
apa fiarta
+ puțin ulei pentru acoperire

pl.title: Maluj jajka bez chemii w oryginalny sposób - całkiem naturalne / Malowanie pisanek
pl.description:
Zbliża się Wielkanoc, więc oto pierwszy w tym roku film przedstawiający malowanie jajek. Maluj jajka w oryginalny sposób, bez użycia chemikaliów, całkiem naturalnie. Aby jajko uzyskało ten efekt, najlepiej użyć białego, więc na początku filmu można zobaczyć, jak wybielić zwykłe żółte jajko.

SKŁADNIKI WYBIELAJĄCE JAJKA
500 ml wody
400 ml octu alkoholowego

SKŁADNIKI DO MALOWANIA JAJ
80 g herbaty z hibiskusa
1 łyżeczka octu (alkohol lub wino)
gotowana woda
+ trochę oleju do powlekania
#farbanjejaja #uskrs #vasrs # uskršnjajaja #easter #eastereggs

de.title: Malen Sie Eier ohne Chemikalien auf die ursprüngliche Art und Weise - ganz natürlich
de.description:
Ostern steht vor der Tür, daher hier das erste Video für dieses Jahr zum Malen von Eiern. Malen Sie die Eier auf natürliche Weise ohne Verwendung von Chemikalien, ganz natürlich. Damit das Ei diesen Effekt erzielt, ist es am besten, Weiß zu verwenden. Am Anfang des Videos können Sie sehen, wie ein gewöhnliches gelbes Ei weiß wird.

EI WHITENING ZUTATEN
500 ml Wasser
400 ml alkoholischer Essig

ZUTATEN ZUM MALEN VON EIEREN
80 g Hibiskus-Tee
1 Teelöffel Essig (Alkoholiker oder Wein)
Gekochtes Wasser
+ etwas Öl zum Beschichten

fr.title: Peindre les œufs sans produits chimiques de la manière originale - tout à fait naturel
fr.description:
Pâques approche, voici donc la première vidéo de cette année pour peindre des œufs. Peignez les œufs de la manière originale sans utiliser de produits chimiques, tout naturellement. Pour que l'œuf obtienne cet effet, il est préférable d'utiliser du blanc.Ainsi, au début de la vidéo, vous pouvez voir comment blanchir un œuf jaune ordinaire.

INGRÉDIENTS DE BLANCHIMENT DES OEUFS
500 ml d'eau
400 ml de vinaigre alcoolisé

INGRÉDIENTS POUR PEINDRE LES OEUFS
80 g de thé d'hibiscus
1 cuillère à café de vinaigre (alcoolisé ou vin)
eau bouillante
+ un peu d'huile pour le revêtement

it.title: Dipingi le uova senza sostanze chimiche nel modo originale - abbastanza naturale
it.description:
La Pasqua si avvicina, quindi ecco il primo video di quest'anno per dipingere le uova. Dipingi le uova nel modo originale senza l'uso di prodotti chimici, abbastanza naturalmente. Affinché l'uovo abbia questo effetto, è meglio usare il bianco, quindi all'inizio del video puoi vedere come sbiancare un normale uovo giallo.

INGREDIENTI PER SBIANCARE L'UOVO
500 ml di acqua
400 ml di aceto alcolico

INGREDIENTI PER VERNICIARE LE UOVA
80 g di tè all'ibisco
1 cucchiaino di aceto (alcolico o vino)
acqua bollita
+ un filo d'olio per ricoprire

ru.title: Пасхальные яйца без химии
ru.description:
Приближается Пасха, поэтому вот первое в этом году видео по росписи яиц. Раскрашиваем яйца оригинальным способом без использования химикатов, вполне естественно. Чтобы яйцо получило такой эффект, лучше всего использовать белок, поэтому в начале видео вы можете увидеть, как отбелить обычное желтое яйцо.

ОТБЕЛИВАЮЩИЕ ИНГРЕДИЕНТЫ ЯЙЦА
500 мл воды
400 мл спиртового уксуса

ИНГРЕДИЕНТЫ ДЛЯ ОКРАСКИ ЯЙЦ
80 г чая из гибискуса
1 чайная ложка уксуса (алкогольного или винного)
кипяченая вода
+ немного масла для покрытия
#farbanjejaja #uskrs #vasrs

be.title: Велікодныя яйкі без хіміі
be.description:
Набліжаецца Вялікдзень, таму вось першае ў гэтым годзе відэа па фарбаванні яек. Фарбуйце яйкі арыгінальным спосабам без выкарыстання хімічных рэчываў, цалкам натуральна. Каб яйка атрымала такі эфект, лепш за ўсё выкарыстоўваць белае, таму ў пачатку відэа вы можаце ўбачыць, як адбяліць звычайнае жоўтае яйка.

ІНГРЭДЫЕНТЫ БЯЛЕННЯ ЯЙК
500 мл вады
400 мл алкагольнага воцату

ІНГРЭДЫЕНТЫ ДЛЯ Афарбоўкі ЯЙК
80 г гарбаты з гібіскуса
1 гарбатная лыжка воцату (алкагольнага ці віннага)
кіпячонай вады
+ трохі алею для пакрыцця
#farbanjejaja #uskrs #vasrs

el.title: Βάψτε αυγά χωρίς χημικά με τον αρχικό τρόπο - αρκετά φυσικά / Ζωγραφική Πασχαλινά αυγά
el.description:
Το Πάσχα πλησιάζει, οπότε εδώ είναι το πρώτο βίντεο για φέτος για τη ζωγραφική αυγών. Χρωματίστε τα αυγά με τον αρχικό τρόπο χωρίς τη χρήση χημικών, φυσικά. Προκειμένου το αυγό να έχει αυτό το αποτέλεσμα, είναι καλύτερο να χρησιμοποιήσετε λευκό, οπότε στην αρχή του βίντεο μπορείτε να δείτε πώς να λευκάσετε ένα συνηθισμένο κίτρινο αυγό.

ΠΕΡΙΣΣΟΤΕΡΑ ΣΥΣΤΑΤΙΚΑ ΛΕΥΚΕΤΙΣΜΟΥ
500 ml νερού
400 ml αλκοολικού ξιδιού

ΣΥΣΤΑΤΙΚΑ ΓΙΑ ΖΩΓΡΑΦΙΚΗ ΑΥΓΑ
80 γραμμάρια τσαγιού ιβίσκου
1 κουταλάκι του γλυκού ξύδι (αλκοολικό ή κρασί)
βρασμένο νερό
+ λίγο λάδι για επικάλυψη
#farbanjejaja #uskrs #vasrs # uskršnjajaja #easter #eastereggs

snippet.title: ISTRA 1961 vs HAJDUK 0:1 (28.kolo, HT Prva liga 20/21)
snippet.description:
Nogometaši Hajduka vratili su se pobjedama te su u 28. kolu HT Prve lige osvojili tri teška boda u Puli protiv Istre 1961 pobjedom 1:0.

Iako su Splićani od početka imali loptu u posjedu i težili napadu, prave šanse su bile vrlo rijetke, pogotovo u prvom poluvremenu. Odmah na startu drugog dijela Vušković je ozbiljno zaprijetio, ali je dobro reagirao domaći vratar Lučić.

Premda je inicijativa Hajduka bila očita, na kraju su gosti za tri boda doslovno ugurali loptu u suparničku mrežu. Učinio je to u 69. minuti Simić, nakon jednog od brojnih kornera koje je izveo Kačaniklić.

Tek tada je domaćin hrabrije krenuo u napade, a dvije prilike je imao Japanac Hara. Na samom kraju dvoboja domaći kapetan Blagojević je dobio drugi žuti karton i Istra 1961 je ostala bez važnih bodova u borbi za ostankom u Ligi.

Hajduk zajedno s Rijekom nastavlja lov na Goricu. Bila je ovo, inače, treća pobjeda Hajduka u sezoni protiv suparnika iz Pule.

HT Prva liga, 28. kolo: Istra 1961 - Hajduk 0:1 (Simić 69.)

snippet.title: rebirthing : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
“I’ve had a lot of lives – like my cat, I’m on my ninth life.” 
Demi Lovato’s explosive documentary series comes to a close with revelations about her broken engagement, her return to the studio, and exploration of moderation sobriety as she attempts to let go of her past and moves ahead living her truth. 

Resources:
 
The National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA) helpline
1-800-931-2237 (they also offer click-to-chat messaging) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
Love Is Respect. Love is more than just the way you feel. Text loveis to 22522 for support and help understanding healthy relationships.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
Text: loveis to 22522
Chat Online: www.loveisrespect.org
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger

 
Find resources for your path to recovery at the Recovery Resource Hub (https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/).

localized.title: rebirthing : Dancing with the Devil
localized.description:
“I’ve had a lot of lives – like my cat, I’m on my ninth life.” 
Demi Lovato’s explosive documentary series comes to a close with revelations about her broken engagement, her return to the studio, and exploration of moderation sobriety as she attempts to let go of her past and moves ahead living her truth. 

Resources:
 
The National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA) helpline
1-800-931-2237 (they also offer click-to-chat messaging) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
Love Is Respect. Love is more than just the way you feel. Text loveis to 22522 for support and help understanding healthy relationships.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
Text: loveis to 22522
Chat Online: www.loveisrespect.org
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger

id.title: Kelahiran Kembali : Dancing with the Devil
id.description:
“Aku mempunyai banyak nyawa – seperti kucingku, aku dalam nyawa kesembilanku sekarang.”
Serial dokumenter eksplosif dari Demi Lovato hamper sampai kepada titik akhir dengan pengungkapan tentang pertunangannya yang kandas, kembalinya ke studio, dan eksplorasi dari kewarasan moderasi ketika dia mencoba untuk melepaskan masa lalunya dan melangkah maju menjalani hidup dengan penuh keceriaan.

Sumber:

Saluran bantuan National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (mereka juga menawarkan perpesanan klik-untuk-obrolan) www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

Saluran siaga SAMHSA untuk perorangan dan anggota keluarga yang mengalami gangguan kesehatan mental dan/atau penggunaan substansi
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Cinta Adalah Respek. Cinta itu lebih besar dari sekadar caramu merasakan. Ketik loveis kirim ke 22522 untuk dukungan dan bantuan memahami hubungan yang sehat.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
Ketik: loveis kirim ke 22522
Obrolan Daring: www.loveisrespect.org

Atau jika kau memerlukan dukungan segera, silakan menghubungi saluran teks krisis daerahmu:
AS: Ketik HOME kirim ke 741741
Britania Raya: Ketik SHOUT kirim ke 85258
Kanada: Ketik CONNECT kirim ke 686868 atau 741741

Pelajari bagaimana cara menyelamatkan jiwa di endoverdose.net.

Temukan sumber-sumber sebagai jalanmu untuk pemulihan di Recovery Resource Hub (https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/).

fr.title: Renaissance : Dancing with the Devil
fr.description:
"J'ai plusieurs vies, comme un chat. J'en suis à ma neuvième."

Le documentaire explosif de Demi Lovato touche à sa fin avec des révélations sur ses fiançailles rompues, son retour en studio et l'expérimentation d'une thérapie de la modération tandis qu'elle tente de tourner la page sur son passé et de vivre sa vérité. 

Ressources :
 
Plateforme d'écoute de la National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (chat en ligne disponible) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
Service SAMHSA pour les individus et proches qui font face à des troubles de la santé mentale et/ou prise de substances
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
L'amour est du respect. L'amour va plus loin que les sentiments. Envoyez "loveis" au 22522 pour soutenir et comprendre ce qu'est une relation saine.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
SMS : loveis au 22522
Chat en ligne : www.loveisrespect.org
 
En cas de besoin immédiat, contactez par SMS votre centre local :
États-Unis : HOME au 741741
Royaume-Uni : SHOUT au 85258
Canada : CONNECT au 686868 ou 741741
 
Apprenez à sauver des vies sur endoverdose.net.
 
Pour vous aider dans votre processus de guérison, rendez-vous sur Recovery Resource Hub (https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/).

pt-BR.title: renascimento : Dancing with the Devil
pt-BR.description:
“Eu já tive várias vidas – como meu gato, estou na minha última.”
A explosiva série documental de Demi Lovato termina com revelações sobre o noivado rompido, sua volta ao estúdio e sua exploração da sobriedade moderada enquanto ela tenta se livrar do passado e encontrar sua verdade.

Recursos:

Telefone de atendimento da National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (também existe a chance de bate-papo online) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
Atendimento de SAMHSA para indivíduos e familiares que enfrentam distúrbios ligados à saúde mental e/ou por uso de substâncias.
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
Love Is Respect. Amor é muito mais do que um sentimento. Envie loveis para 22522 para ter apoio e aprender a compreender relacionamentos saudáveis.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
Envie: loveis to 22522
Chat Online: www.loveisrespect.org
 
Caso necessite de auxílio imediato, entre em contato com suas opções locais de atendimento:
Estados Unidos: Envie HOME para 741741
Reino Unido: Envie SHOUT para 85258
Canadá: Envie CONNECT para 686868 ou 741741
 
Aprenda a salvar vidas em endoverdose.net.

Encontre recursos para seu caminho para a recuperação em Recovery Resource Hub (https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/).

es-419.title: renacimiento : Dancing with the Devil
es-419.description:
"He tenido muchas vidas. Como mi gato, estoy en mi última vida".
La explosiva serie documental de Demi Lovato llega a su fin con revelaciones sobre su compromiso cancelado, su regreso al estudio y la exploración de la sobriedad moderada mientras intenta dejar atrás su pasado y avanzar viviendo su verdad.

Recursos:

Línea de ayuda de la Asociación Nacional de Trastornos Alimentarios (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (también ofrecen chat en línea)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

Línea directa de la SAMHSA para personas y familiares que se enfrentan a trastornos de salud mental y/o consumo de sustancias
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

El amor es respeto. El amor es algo más que lo que se siente. Envía loveis al 22522 para obtener apoyo y ayuda para entender las relaciones saludables.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
Texto: loveis al 22522
Chat en línea: www.loveisrespect.org

O si necesitas apoyo inmediato, contacta por SMS a tu centro de ayuda local:
EE.UU.: Envía el mensaje HOME al 741741
REINO UNIDO: Envía el mensaje SHOUT al 85258
Canadá: Envía el mensaje CONNECT al 686868 o al 741741

Aprende a salvar vidas en endoverdose.net.

Encuentra recursos para tu camino hacia la recuperación en el Recovery Resource Hub (https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/).

ko.title: 환생 : Dancing with the Devil
ko.description:
"저는 제 고양이처럼 목숨이 아홉 개예요. 아홉 번째 인생을 살고 있죠"
데미 로바토의 파혼, 녹음실 복귀 이야기와 음주와 약물의 적정량 사용을 통해 과거를 놓고 진실한 삶을 살려는 시도를 공개하며 폭발적인 다큐멘터리 시리즈는 막을 내린다.

도움받을 곳:

전국 섭식 장애 협회 (NEDA) 헬프라인
1-800-931-2237 (채팅/메시징 서비스 제공)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

정신건강 및 약물 남용 장애를 앓고 있는 개인 및 가족을 위한 SAMHSA 핫라인
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 

사랑은 존중입니다. 사랑은 감정 그 이상입니다. 22522로 loveis를 보내시면 도움과 함께 건강한 관계에 관해 배울 수 있습니다.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
문자: 22522로 loveis를 보내세요
온라인 상담: www.loveisrespect.org

즉각적인 도움이 필요할 경우, 지역 위기 문자를 이용하세요.
미국: 741741로 문자 HOME 보내기
영국: 85258로 문자 SHOUT 보내기
캐나다: 686868 또는 741741로 문자 CONNECT 보내기

endoverdose.net에서 생명을 구할 수 있는 방법을 알아보세요.

Recovery Resource Hub에서 회복 과정을 위한 자원을 확인하세요.
(https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/)

de.title: Wiedergeburt : Dancing with the Devil
de.description:
"Ich hatte viele Leben, wie meine Katze. Das ist mein neuntes."
Demi Lovatos explosive Dokuserie endet mit Enthüllungen über ihre gelöste Verlobung, ihre Rückkehr ins Studio und das Konzept des maßvollen Konsums, während sie versucht, ihre Vergangenheit ruhen zu lassen und ihre Wahrheit zu leben.

Hilfsangebote:

Telefonische Anlaufstelle der National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (auch Click-to-Chat-Nachrichten)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

Telefonische Anlaufstelle von SAMHSA für Menschen mit psychischen Erkrankungen und/oder Suchtstörungen und deren Angehörige
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Liebe ist Respekt. Liebe ist mehr als das Gefühl. SMS mit loveis an 22522 zur Unterstützung von gesunden Beziehungen.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
SMS: loveis to 22522
Online-Chat: www.loveisrespect.org

Wenn Sie sofortige Hilfe benötigen, nehmen Sie Angebote zum Krisenbeistand per SMS wahr:
USA: SMS mit HOME an 741741
Vereinigtes Königreich: SMS mit SHOUT an 85258
Kanada: SMS mit CONNECT an 686868 oder 741741

Lernen Sie, Leben zu retten, auf endoverdose.net.

Finden Sie Hilfsangebote für Ihren Weg in die Genesung bei Recovery Resource Hub
(https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/).

snippet.title: What Color Is My Hoodie?
snippet.description:
Grey? Blue? Purple? It can look different, depending on the context. Let's talk about color perception, color temperature, and the history of laundry.

Atmospheric opacity image from ESA/Hubble (F. Granato): https://www.eso.org/public/images/atm_opacity/ - image licensed under CC by 4.0 - https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

The optical illusion is original, but based on the work of David Novick: https://twitter.com/novickprof/status/1139342022551191553

More on Illuminant D65: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Illuminant_D65 - the references in this article go into the full technical detail

I'm at https://tomscott.com
on Twitter at https://twitter.com/tomscott
on Facebook at https://facebook.com/tomscott
and on Instagram as tomscottgo

snippet.title: URANAK1 | O vakcinama, imunizaciji, merama | Mila Alečković | Goran Vesić
snippet.description:
Dobrodošli na zvanični YouTube kanal K1 TV-a!
↓ ↓ ↓ Posetite naš sajt i naloge na društvenim mrežama:
K1TV WEB: https://bit.ly/K1TVsajt
K1TV Program: https://bit.ly/K1TVprogram
✔ FACEBOOK: https://bit.ly/K1TVFacebook 
📷 INSTAGRAM: https://bit.ly/K1TVInstagram
❥ YOUTUBE: https://bit.ly/K1TVYouTube

Razonodite se uz muzičko-zabavni sadržaj domaće produkcije najvišeg standarda, kao i premijerno prikazivanje najpopularnijih stranih TV formata.
Iz naše produkcije izdvajamo sledeće emisije:

"JOJO"
Dve devojke iz grada koje su navikle na modu, izlaske, moderne tehnologije i glamur pokušavaju da upoznaju manje urbane delove Srbije i da ih zavole.
Uskoro:

"Šta sam sebi, ko sam tebi"
Voditelj, Ivan Stanković, marketing guru, vodi intervju sa popularnim autorima u studiju, pred publikom. Gost “jedan na jedan” razgovara sa voditeljem o svemu, “na iglama” zbog voditelja i prisutne publike.
LINK: https://bit.ly/StaSamSebiIkoSamSebi

"Top Lista"
Drugačija od drugih, Iva, vodi vas u svet aktuelne svetske i domaće muzičke scene. Saznaćete šta drugi slušaju, ko je i zbog čega na vrhu top lista. Uz to, otkrićete
zanimljive detalje iz privatnog života izvođača sa top liste.

"Generalka"
Koje javne ličnosti su radile intervencije na licu i telu? Kako su izgledale pre, a kako posle njih i da li one to kriju ili otvoreno o tome pričaju? Kroz ove zanimljive razgovore vode vas Milica Lešić i Ljubomir Dorontić.
LINK: https://bit.ly/K1Generalka

"Dnevna Doza Popa"
Glumačko-voditeljski par Nataša Aksentijević i Predrag Peđa Damnjanović vas uvode u svet pop kulture. Sa gostima pričaju o zabavnim sadržajima, umetnosti i aktuelnim dešavanjima u svetu i kod nas. Uz pomoć benda i kroz zabavne igre zajedno sa gostima se zabavljaju na dinamičan i upečatljiv način.
LINK: https://bit.ly/DnevnaDozaPopa

"Kec na Jedanaest"
Ponovo su tu! Omiljeni voditeljski par, Boško Jakovljević i Aleksandra Jeftanović, vode vas kroz kasni jutarnji šou, svakog radnog dana od 11 do 13.
LINK: https://bit.ly/KecNaJedanaest

Pratite nas na MTS-u, Supernovi i Orionu.

#K1

┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈
Svako neovlašćeno kopiranje ili postavljanje video materijala K1 TV bićemo prinuđeni da prijavimo YouTube administraciji što može rezultovati i trajnim gašenjem Vašeg kanala od strane YouTube-a ili tužbe od strane K1 TV.

snippet.title: Emanet 159. Bölüm Fragmanı | Legacy Episode 159 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kırımlı is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father’s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew… Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle’s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kırımlı family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kırımlı mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: Hercai 66. Bölüm
snippet.description:
66. Bölüm Özeti 🦋
Aldıkları haberle perişan olan Şadoğulları’nı yeni ve zorlu bir süreç beklemektedir. Miran kendini büyük bir çıkmazda hissetmekte ve bu durumdan kurtulabilmek için çabalamaktadır. Destek ise hiç beklemediği birinden gelir. Nasuh ve Azize arasında ipler yeniden gerilirken Cihan aldığı kararla harekete geçer. Zehra evlatları ve Umut için güçlü kalmaya çalışırken gerçekleri araştıran Miran ise babaannesinden bir söz alır. Hazar kimin kurşunuyla vuruldu? Reyyan yaşayacak mı?

Ayrıcalıklardan yararlanmak için bu kanala katılın:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC2l92bN_FWHjZZPdOYnZveg/join 

“İntikamdan doğan imkansız bir aşkın hikayesi”

Yapımcılığını, Mia Yapım Banu Akdeniz üstlendiği, "İntikamdan doğan imkansız bir aşkın hikayesi" mottosuyla yola çıkan Hercai'nin başrollerini Akın Akınözü, Ebru Şahin, Gülçin Santıroğlu, Serhat Tutumluer, Ayda Aksel, Macit Sonkan, Serdar Özer, Oya Unustası, Tansu Taşanlar ve  İlay Erkök paylaşıyor.

Hercai YouTube Kanalına Abone Olmak İçin; https://bit.ly/2vwmORD

atv Resmi YouTube Kanalına Abone Olmak İçin; https://goo.gl/dmrDLN

Hercai Web Sayfası; https://goo.gl/ziLDeQ

Hvala Vam na razumevanju!

snippet.title: Space Jam: A New Legacy – Trailer 1
snippet.description:
Tunes vs. Goons. Watch LeBron James and Bugs Bunny in the new trailer for Space Jam: A New Legacy. In theaters and streaming on HBO Max – July 16. #SpaceJamMovie 

-----------------
https://www.facebook.com/SpaceJamMovie​
https://www.instagram.com/SpaceJamMovie/​
https://twitter.com/spacejammovie/​
-----------------
Welcome to the Jam!  Basketball champion and global icon LeBron James goes on an epic adventure alongside timeless Tune Bugs Bunny with the animated/live-action event “Space Jam: A New Legacy,” from director Malcolm D. Lee and an innovative filmmaking team including Ryan Coogler and Maverick Carter.  This transformational journey is a manic mashup of two worlds that reveals just how far some parents will go to connect with their kids. When LeBron and his young son Dom are trapped in a digital space by a rogue A.I., LeBron must get them home safe by leading Bugs, Lola Bunny and the whole gang of notoriously undisciplined Looney Tunes to victory over the A.I.’s digitized champions on the court: a powered-up roster of professional basketball stars as you’ve never seen them before.  It’s Tunes versus Goons in the highest-stakes challenge of his life, that will redefine LeBron’s bond with his son and shine a light on the power of being yourself. The ready-for-action Tunes destroy convention, supercharge their unique talents and surprise even “King” James by playing the game their own way.

James stars alongside Oscar nominee Don Cheadle (the “Avengers” films, “Hotel Rwanda”), Khris Davis (“Judas and the Black Messiah,” TV’s “Atlanta”), Sonequa Martin-Green (TV’s “The Walking Dead,” “Star Trek: Discovery”), newcomer Cedric Joe, Jeff Bergman (“Looney Tunes Cartoons”), Eric Bauza (“Looney Tunes Cartoons”), and Zendaya (upcoming “Dune,” “Malcolm & Marie”).

Lee (“Girls Trip,” “Night School”) directs from a screenplay by Juel Taylor & Tony Rettenmaier & Keenan Coogler & Terence Nance.  The film’s producers are Ryan Coogler, LeBron James, Maverick Carter and Duncan Henderson, and the executive producers are Sev Ohanian, Zinzi Coogler, Allison Abbate, Jesse Ehrman, Jamal Henderson, Spencer Beighley, Justin Lin, Terence Nance and Ivan Reitman.

The director’s behind-the-scenes creative team includes director of photography Salvatore Totino (“Spider-Man: Homecoming”), animation producer Troy Nethercott (“Wonder Park”), production designers Kevin Ishioka (“The Mule”), Akin McKenzie (Netflix’s “When They See Us”) and Clint Wallace (upcoming “Eternals”), editor Bob Ducsay (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters,” “Star Wars Episode VIII – The Last Jedi”) and costume designer Melissa Bruning (“Rampage,” “War for the Planet of the Apes”).  The music is by Kris Bowers (“Greenbook,” Netflix’s “Bridgerton”).

Warner Bros. Pictures Presents a Proximity/The SpringHill Company Production, a Malcolm D. Lee Film, “Space Jam: A New Legacy.”  The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures.  It will be released in theaters nationwide on July 16, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.

snippet.title: Auto Market S05 E31 - 10. travnja 2021.
snippet.description:
U ovoj epizodi donosimo:
0:00 Uvod i najava testa Mercedes S klase
1:45 Najluskuznija Toyota - Toyota Highlander - Jura se fura
9:23 Najveći ekran u autu ikad! - Mercedes EQS Hyperscreen
11:41 Osvježeni Peugeot 5008 - testirao Branimir Tomurad

snippet.title: Taylor Swift - Mr. Perfectly Fine (Taylor’s Version) (From The Vault) (Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
Official lyric video for “Mr. Perfectly Fine” (Taylor’s Version) (From The Vault) – off her upcoming Fearless (Taylor’s Version) album. Get the album here: https://taylor.lnk.to/fearlesstaylorsversion. Get the song here: https://taylor.lnk.to/mpf

►Subscribe to Taylor Swift on YouTube: https://ts.lnk.to/subscribe 
 
►Exclusive Merch: http://taylorswift.lnk.to/store

►Follow Taylor Swift online:
Instagram: http://instagram.com/taylorswift  
Facebook: http://facebook.com/taylorswift  
Tumblr: http://taylorswift.tumblr.com  
Twitter: http://twitter.com/taylorswift13  
Snapchat: http://snapchat.com/add/taylorswift
Website: http://www.taylorswift.com  

►Follow Taylor Nation Online
Instagram: http://instagram.com/taylornation  
Tumblr: http://taylornation.tumblr.com  
Twitter: http://twitter.com/taylornation13
TikTok: http://tiktok.com/@taylornation

Official Lyrics:
 
Mr. perfect face
Mr. here to stay
Mr. looked me in the eye and told me you would never go away
Everything was right
Mr. I’ve been waiting for you all my life
Mr. every single day until the end I will be by your side
But that was when I got to know
Mr. change of heart
Mr. leaves me all alone
I fall apart
It takes everything in me just to get up each day
But it’s wonderful to see that you’re okay

Hello, Mr. perfectly fine
How’s your heart after breaking mine?
Mr. always at the right place at the right time, baby
Hello, Mr. casually cruel
Mr. everything revolves around you
I’ve been Miss misery since your goodbye
And you’re Mr. perfectly fine

Mr. never told me why
Mr. never had to see me cry
Mr. insincere apology so he doesn’t look like the bad guy
He goes about his day
Forgets he ever even heard my name
Well I thought you might be different than the rest
I guess you’re all the same
Because I hear he’s got his arm ‘round a brand new girl
I’ve been picking up my heart
He’s been picking up her
And I never got past what you put me through
But it’s wonderful to see that it never phased you

Repeat chorus

So dignified in your well pressed suit
So strategized
All the eyes on you
Sashay your way to your seat
It’s the best seat
In the best room
Oh, he’s so smug
Mr. always wins
So far above me in every sense
So far above feeling anything

And it’s really such a shame
It’s such a shame
Cause I was Miss here to stay
Now I’m Miss gonna be alright someday
And someday maybe you’ll miss me
But by then you’ll be Mr. too late

Goodbye, Mr. perfectly fine
How’s your heart after breaking mine?
Mr. always at the right place at the right time, baby
Goodbye, Mr. casually cruel
Mr. everything revolves around you
I’ve been Miss misery for the last time
And you’re Mr. perfectly fine
You’re perfectly fine
Mr. look me in the eye and tell me you

#taylorswift #mrperfectlyfine #fromthevault #fearlesstaylorsversion

Music video by Taylor Swift performing Mr. Perfectly Fine (Taylor’s Version) (From The Vault) (Lyric Video). © 2021 Taylor Swift

http://vevo.ly/enJPdT
